BackupSchedule.description: Cron expression for backup schedule (e.g., cron(0 5 * * ? *) for daily at 5 AM UTC).
BackupSchedule.title: Backup Schedule

RetentionDays.description: Number of days to retain backups.
RetentionDays.title: Retention Days

CentralBackupVaultArn.description: Optional ARN of central backup vault for cross-account copy.
CentralBackupVaultArn.title: Central Backup Vault ARN

DestinationAccountId.description: AWS account ID of the destination backup vault for cross-account copy.
DestinationAccountId.title: Destination Account ID

DestinationKmsKeyArn.description: ARN of the KMS key in the destination account for encrypting copied backups.
DestinationKmsKeyArn.title: Destination KMS Key ARN
